{{Quote|Successors to Harrsk, Delvardus, and the others now held power within the Deep Core kingdoms, and while warlords such as Foga Brill and Moff Tethys lacked military muscle, they made up for it in base cruelty.|[[Voren Na'al/Legends|Voren Na'al]]|<ref name="The New Essential Chronology">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref>}}
[[Moff/Legends|Moff]] '''Jmanuel Tethys''' was one of the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]] "[[replacement warlord]]s" that came to power after [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala|Daala]] executed the thirteen most powerful warlords and unified their forces in the name of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Old Empire]]. Like [[Foga Brill/Legends|Foga Brill]], Tethys lacked military muscle and compensated with cruelty.

Like the other replacement warlords following the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]] battles of [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]] between the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and Imperial forces, Tethys' fate is unknown, though the remainder of his forces, along with the remaining forces of [[Foga Brill/Legends|Foga Brill]] and [[Cinzero Gann]], reformed into the [[Second Imperium]].
